q: Do you prefer to study in the morning or in the afternoon?
examiner_note:
Câu hỏi này về sở thích cá nhân và nhịp sinh học (circadian rhythm). 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Bạn có thể chọn một trong hai hoặc cả hai, giải thích tại sao (tỉnh táo nhất lúc nào, yên tĩnh nhất lúc nào). 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'early bird', 'night owl', 'peak concentration', 'fresh mind', 'afternoon slump' để câu trả lời tự nhiên và hay hơn.

band7.text: I definitely prefer studying in the morning. That's when my mind is freshest and I can concentrate much better. In the afternoon, I often feel a bit tired after lunch, so it's harder for me to focus on difficult tasks.
band7.note: Trả lời rõ ràng, giải thích lý do liên quan đến sự tỉnh táo. Từ vựng ổn ('freshest', 'concentrate').

band8.text: I'm definitely an early bird, so I find that my peak concentration levels are usually between 8 AM and 11 AM. I try to tackle the most demanding subjects during this time, whereas the afternoon is better suited for more routine tasks like organizing my notes.
band8.note: Sử dụng các cụm từ hay như 'early bird', 'peak concentration levels', 'tackle', 'demanding subjects'.

band9.text: I'm firmly in the camp of early morning studiers. There's a certain stillness at dawn that really aids my focus. I find that I'm far more productive before the hustle and bustle of the day begins, as it allows me to engage in deep work without any external distractions.
band9.note: Diễn đạt cực kỳ tinh tế ('firmly in the camp', 'stillness at dawn', 'aids my focus', 'hustle and bustle', 'deep work'). Sử dụng từ vựng ở trình độ C2.

v.example: As an early bird, I always finish my most important tasks before noon.
My roommate is a night owl and often studies until 3 AM.

v.meaning: sự tập trung cao độ nhất
v.example: I try to schedule my most difficult classes during my peak concentration hours.
It's best to tackle complex problems with a fresh mind in the morning.

v.meaning: sự uể oải vào buổi chiều
v.example: Taking a short walk can help you overcome the mid-afternoon slump.
Traveling across time zones can disrupt your circadian rhythm.
I love the stillness of the library early in the morning.
A quiet environment and a clean desk really aid my focus.

v.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp
v.example: I prefer living in the suburbs to escape the hustle and bustle of the city.

v.meaning: phương pháp làm việc tập trung sâu
v.example: I reserve three hours every morning for deep work on my research paper.

v.meaning: sự xao nhãng từ bên ngoài
v.example: Turning off your phone helps minimize external distractions while studying.
A cup of coffee help me feel more alert in the morning.
I always feel a bit lethargic after a heavy lunch.
The government is determined to tackle the problem of unemployment.
Writing a dissertation is a very demanding task.
Answering emails is a routine task that I usually do in the afternoon.
I find that I'm most productive when I have a clear to-do list.
Long-distance runners need a lot of physical and mental stamina.
Loss of focus can lead to mistakes in your work.
Working in short bursts can help improve your concentration span.
Sleep deprivation can negatively affect cognitive function.
I find that I have more mental energy in the early hours of the day.
Working in a quiet room increases my study efficiency.
Please do not disturb me while I'm in a meeting.
The classroom environment should be conducive to learning.
There was a very friendly atmosphere at the party.
I enjoy the quietness of the countryside.
Proper nutrition is essential for peak performance in sports.
I have a very tight schedule this week.
Reading before bed is a good habit to get into.
Do you have a preference for tea or coffee?
There is a tendency for prices to rise during the holiday season.
My sister is definitely not a morning person; she hates waking up early.
I need a holiday to recharge my batteries.
The long flight caused a lot of physical fatigue.
Regular exercise can help boost your energy levels.
I need more clarity on the details of the project.
Temperature control is necessary for the optimal growth of the plants.
We need to develop a long-term strategy for the company.
The government has allocated more funds to healthcare.
I need four hours of uninterrupted time to finish this report.
Children often have a much shorter concentration span than adults.
She is very disciplined about her exercise routine.
University education requires a lot of self-study.
You need to be consistent in your efforts to achieve your goals.
He has a very methodical approach to solving problems.
You'll feel much more alert if you're well-rested before the exam.
The new law has been quite effective in reducing crime.
We need to improve the efficiency of the production process.
Overcoming procrastination is a constant struggle for many students.
